list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics ORDER BY dbname

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT instance FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' ORDER BY instance

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query: SELECT begin_snap::text || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' ORDER BY begin_snap

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query: SELECT begin_snap::text || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance' ORDER BY begin_snap

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  🔄 Reset Filters

panels.title: Top 10 Buffer Wait Classes by Waits

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_classes AS (  SELECT b.class  FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics b  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND b.dbname = '$dbname'    
AND b.instance = '$instance'    
AND b.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int  
GROUP BY b.class  
ORDER BY SUM(b.waits) DESC  LIMIT 10) 
SELECT  b.snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS time,  b.class,  b.waits 
FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics b 
JOIN top_classes t ON t.class = b.class 
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''   
AND b.dbname = '$dbname'   AND b.instance = '$instance'   
AND b.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Total Wait Time (s) by Buffer Class (Top 10)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT class AS metric, SUM(total_wait_time_s) AS total_wait_time_s
FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY class
ORDER BY total_wait_time_s DESC
LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Avg Wait Time (ms) by Buffer Class (Top 10)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT class AS metric, AVG(avg_time_ms) AS avg_wait_time_ms
FROM awr_buffer_wait_statistics
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY class
ORDER BY avg_wait_time_ms DESC
LIMIT 10;
